app.title: Scanby Print Service
app.tagline: Kitchen ticket printing for your venue
app.runningInTrayHint: New orders print automatically. You can close this window.

errors.selectIpFirst: Select or enter a printer IP first
errors.notPaired: App must be paired before connecting a printer
errors.printerUnreachable: Printer not reachable at this IP

pairing.step1: Open your Scanby dashboard → Settings → Print Service
pairing.step2: Click <1>Connect Printer</1> to link this device
pairing.keepOpen: Keep this app open until pairing completes.

printer.title: Printer
printer.subtitle: Network receipt printer
printer.scanHint: Scan runs automatically on pair. Rescan anytime to change printer.
printer.testPrintOkAutoSave: Test print OK. Saving automatically in 5s…
printer.savedToTray: Saved. App is now running in the system tray.
printer.onePrinterFound: One printer found — running test print…
printer.noPrintersFound: No printers found. Enter IP manually or rescan.
printer.multiplePrintersFound: Found {{count}} printers. Pick one or rescan.
printer.autoSaveCancelled: Auto-save cancelled. Use Save & Start when ready.
printer.offlineHint: Printer offline. Reconnect checks the saved IP. Rescan searches the local network.
printer.stillUnreachable: Printer {{ip}} is still unreachable. Try rescan if the IP changed.
printer.noPrintersOnNetwork: No printers found on your network.
printer.foundOneSwitch: Found 1 printer at {{ip}}. Switch if your printer moved.
printer.foundManyNotInList: Found {{count}} printers. Saved IP {{savedIp}} not in list.
printer.multipleAfterReconnect: Multiple printers detected after reconnect. Pick the correct one below.

history.title: Print history
history.empty: No prints yet. Orders from your venue will appear here.
history.retrySkipped: Print was skipped — duplicate order within 30s.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Updates and app preferences
settings.storeUpdates: Microsoft Store builds update through the Store.

updatePrompt.title: Update available
updatePrompt.body: Version <1>{{version}}</1> is ready. Restart now to get the latest fixes and features.

trayDiscovery.runningInTray: Scanby is running in the tray (near the clock). Click the tray icon to reopen.

notifications.noPrinterFoundBody: Open Scanby Print Service to set up your printer.
notifications.printerConnectedMany: Connected to {{ip}} (first of {{count}}). Rescan in settings to change.
notifications.printerSetupNeededBody: Found printer at {{ip}} but test print failed. Open settings to finish setup.
notifications.multiplePrintersBody: Open Scanby Print Service to choose the correct printer.
notifications.runningInTray: Scanby is running in the tray
notifications.runningInTrayBody: Near the clock. Click the tray icon to reopen.
notifications.connectedToVenueBody: Choose your kitchen printer to finish setup.
notifications.channelDisconnectedBody: Scanby is not receiving live orders. Check your internet connection.
notifications.updateReadyBody: Version {{version}} is ready. Restart to install.
